page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: ENST440 or ENST6 40.

ENST643 Advanced Industrial Ecology (3 Credits)

Problems of waste management and recycling in human societies are covered. The industrial ecology approach to design is contrasted with analogous patterns and processes from natural ecosystems. Prerequisite: BSCI361; and permission of AGNR-Environmental Science & Technology department.

Jointly offered with: ENST443.
